enterTitle: Shigar da taken meta don ganin binciken tsawo.
titleTooShort: Taken ya yi gajere sosai. Ƙara ƙarin kalmomi don bayyana shafin da kyau da kuma amfani da sararin da ake da shi a sakamakon bincike.
titleTooLong: Taken ya wuce kewayon da Google yakan nuna cikakke (kusan faɗin pixel 580-600, yawanci har zuwa haruffa 50-60). Ana iya yanke shi.
titleGoodLength: Taken ya dace da kewayon da yawanci ake nunawa cikakke a sakamakon Google (kusan pixel 450-580 da kusan haruffa 45-60).
enterDescription: Shigar da bayanin meta don ganin binciken tsawo.
descriptionTooShort: Bayanin ya yi gajere sosai. Ƙara ƙarin rubutu da ya fi bayyana abin da mai amfani zai samu a shafin da kuma dalilin da ya kamata ya danna.
descriptionTooLong: Bayanin ya wuce kewayon da Google yakan fi nunawa cikakke (kusan haruffa 150-160 ko ~pixel 920). Ana iya yanke shi ko maye gurbinsa da wani ɓangare daga shafin.
descriptionGoodLength: Bayanin ya dace da kewayon da ake saba da shi don sakamakon bincike (kusan haruffa 120-160 da har zuwa ~pixel 920), wanda yawanci ya dace da jimloli 2-3 masu gajarta.
urlHelper: Ana amfani da URL ne kawai a cikin dubawa - ba ya shafar lissafin tsawon taken meta da bayanin.
titlePlaceholder: Misali. Sabis na SEO na gidan yanar gizo - Arteon
descriptionPlaceholder: Bayyana a cikin jimloli 2-3 abin da mai amfani zai samu a shafin da kuma amfanin da zai samu. Haɗa kalmomin mabuɗin ku ta hanyar dabi'a.
previewHelper: Dubawan kusan ne - Google na iya yanke ko canza taken da bayanin dangane da faɗin allo da rubutun kansa
exampleDescription: Dubawan bayanin shafin ku zai bayyana a nan. Rubuta a taƙaice game da abin da kuke bayarwa, yadda kuke taimaka wa abokin ciniki, da kuma dalilin da ya sa wannan shafin ya cancanta a ziyarce shi.
